Magical items are revealed to be only as valuable as the materials from which they (Alteration, Abjuration) Sphere: Law, Combat Level: 5 Range: Touch Components: V, S, M Casting Time: 8 Duration: 1 day Area of Effect: Creature touched Saving Throw: Neg. [PDF_PAGE 210 | score=6] Discern Elven Influence Disbelieving a creature includes all gear, equipment, or treasure carried or worn by that creature; it does not include other objects that come into contact with that creature, such as walls, doors, chairs, and so on. Disbelief is not automatic; it requires an ex- treme effort. To successfully disbelieve, the pries must make a saving thmw vs. paralyzation. A suc- cessful saving throw means the priest has disbe- lieved; failure means that the spell has failed and the priest has not convinced himself of the crea- tures’ or objects’ nonexistence. While this spell is in effect, the DM must record any damage suffered by the priest from dis- believed creatures. When the spe
[PDF_PAGE 21 | score=5] I - Alm Allies - Dwarf, Gnome Alert Allies - Dwarf, Gnome (Divination, Alteration) Sphere: Thought Level: 2 Range: Touch Components: V, S Casting Time: 1 rd. + 1 rd. per creature touched Duration: 8 hrs. maximum Area of Effect: 90-ft. radius Saving Throw: None This spell enables the priest to send an instanta- neous mental missive to his comrades alerting them to a dangerous situation. It is not possible to send any message other than “Alert” by means of this spell, nor is two-way communication of any sort possible, hut the true meaning of the mental missive, other than the fact that a dangerous situa- tion exists, can be prearranged if so desired. Alert allies can be cast only on awake, liv
[PDF_PAGE 121 | score=5] - Claws of Thad Hw- Dwarf Claws of Thard Harr - Dwarf (Alteration) Sphere: Combat Level: 1 Range: Touch Components: V, S, M Casting Time: 4 Duration: 3 ids. + 1 rd.ilevel Area of Effect: 1 dwarf Saving Throw: None This spell transforms the hands of a willing dwarf into rending talons know as the claws of Thard Ham. Each talon inflicts ld4+2 points of damage with a successful attack. Two anacks are possible per round, one with each claw. The long claws prevent the dwarf from wielding a weapon for the duration of the spell. The spell requires the priest's holy symbol and. a preserved talon of a wild beast personally slain by the caster, Neither is destroyed by the casting. Notes: Granted by th
[PDF_PAGE 195 | score=5] M - Dep~ss Resistance -Elf, Gnome vents further loss of blood, vital fluids, and hit points and prevents foreign substances and poi- sons that are propelled through the body by the natural actions of breathing, blood pumping, or di- gestion from dispersing any further. It thus keeps poisoned or sorely wounded beings alive for the spell duration. The spell also prokcts the subject against addi- tional damage from nonmagical attacks or han- dling. For example, it allows the caster to drag a sorely injured companion over rough ground with- out causing further harm. The caster can end the effect instantly at will regardless of how much dis- tance separates him or her from the affected being. Rec

Spellcasting requiring a somatic component is im- possible within a brianmgle. If the owner is moving, cloth raiment and exposed cloth, paper, or vellum items must save vs. acid Once per round (or ponion there00 within the briartangle or they are rent and tom. Such items must make at least One item saving thmw (for the initial round of contact). Magical items receive a +2 bonus to this saving thrmu. Fire destroys a briartangle in a round (regard- less of the size of its area of effect), but creatures within it take 2d6 
[PDF_PAGE 41 | score=3] Archer’s Redoubt - Elf f between multiple creatures, to a minimum of one- half hour per creature. Thus, a 3rd-level caster can confer this ability on two creaNres for 1% hours. The recipient can end the spell’s effect on himself with a word. The material components of this spell are the priest’s holy symbol and an acorn purloined from a squirrel’s secret stash. Notes: Granted by the forest gnome god, Baervan Wildwanderer.
